# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "appNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "A prefix used for naming all resources to ensure uniqueness. Must be lowercase and alphanumeric."
      },
      "minLength": 3,
      "maxLength": 10
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S1",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU name for the App Service Plan (e.g., B1, S1, P1V2)."
      }
    },
    "appServicePlanSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU tier for the App Service Plan (e.g., Basic, Standard, PremiumV2)."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "minLength": 1,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator username for the SQL Server."
      }
    },
    "sqlAdminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "minLength": 8,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Administrator password for the SQL Server. Must be at least 8 characters long and contain characters from three of the four categories: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and non-alphanumeric characters."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSkuName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "S0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU name for the SQL Database (e.g., S0, P1, GP_S_Gen5_1)."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseSkuTier": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU tier for the SQL Database (e.g., Basic, Standard, GeneralPurpose)."
      }
    },
    "sqlDatabaseMaxSizeBytes": {
      "type": "int",
      "defaultValue": 2147483648,
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Maximum size of the SQL Database in bytes (e.g., 2GB = 2147483648)."
      }
    },
    "storageAccountSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Standard_ZRS",
        "Premium_LRS",
        "Premium_ZRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "SKU for the Storage Account."
      }
    },
    "webAppRuntimeStack": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "DOTNET|6.0",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The runtime stack for the Web App (e.g., 'DOTNET|6.0', 'NODE|16-lts', 'PHP|8.0')."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "uniqueSuffix": "[uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)]",
    "appServicePlanName": "[format('{0}-plan-{1}', parameters('appNamePrefix'), variables('uniqueSuffix'))]",
    "webAppName": "[format('{0}-webapp-{1}', parameters('appNamePrefix'), variables('uniqueSuffix'))]",
    "sqlServerName": "[format('{0}-sqlserver-{1}', parameters('appNamePrefix'), variables('uniqueSuffix'))]",
    "sqlDatabaseName": "[format('{0}-sqldb-{1}', parameters('appNamePrefix'), variables('uniqueSuffix'))]",
    "storageAccountName": "[format('{0}sa{1}', parameters('appNamePrefix'), variables('uniqueSuffix'))]",
    "webAppKind": "app"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/serverfarms",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[variables('appServicePlanName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('appServicePlanSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('appServicePlanSkuTier')]"
      },
      "kind": "web",
      "properties": {
        "reserved": true
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[variables('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('sqlAdminUsername')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]",
        "version": "12.0",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', variables('sqlServerName'), 'AllowAllWindowsAzureIps')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[format('{0}/{1}', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseSkuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "maxSizeBytes": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseMaxSizeBytes')]",
        "collation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Web/sites",
      "apiVersion": "2022-09-01",
      "name": "[variables('webAppName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "kind": "[variables('webAppKind')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "serverFarmId": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('appServicePlanName'))]",
        "httpsOnly": true,
        "siteConfig": {
          "linuxFxVersion": "[parameters('webAppRuntimeStack')]",
          "minTlsVersion": "1.2",
          "connectionStrings": [
            {
              "name": "DefaultConnection",
              "connectionString": "[format('Server=tcp:{0}.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog={1};Persist Security Info=False;User ID={2};Password={3};MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', variables('sqlServerName'), variables('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]",
              "type": "SQLAzure"
            }
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[variables('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageAccountSku')]"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": false,
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "webAppHostname": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', variables('webAppName'))).defaultHostName]"
    },
    "sqlServerFullQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName'))).fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[variables('storageAccountName')]"
    }
  }
}
